title: phyllorkis micrantha
intro: Phyllorkis micrantha, also known as the white flowered Phyllorkis, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Phyllorkis micrantha include teas, infusions, and powders, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
